name: deepmarks-extension
description: Save bookmarks to deepmarks.org and Nostr relays.

scripts.icons: mkdir -p public/icons && for s in 16 32 48 128; do sips -s format png -z $s $s public/pennant.svg --out public/icons/pennant-$s.png >/dev/null; done
scripts.package:chrome: npm run build:chrome && cd dist && zip -r ../deepmarks-chrome.zip .
scripts.package:firefox: npm run build:firefox && cd dist && zip -r ../deepmarks-firefox.zip .
